title: Gas report - Week 49
summary:
LNG
Spot voyage prices continue their fall this week, with all three routes seeing similar falls of around 16-24%. The biggest loser was BLNG2g, shaving $57,551 off from the December 2 publication to close at $173,296 for USG-Japan RV. Freeports liquidity injection is still having an impact, so tonnage availability and lower spot enquiry is facing downward pressure.

children.title: LNG
children.summary: Spot voyage prices continue their fall this week, with all three routes seeing similar falls of around 16-24%. The biggest loser was BLNG2g, shaving $57,551 off from the December 2 publication to close at $173,296 for USG-Japan RV.

children.title: LPG
children.summary: The BLPG1 route has been quieter this week. With most fixtures now covered out until January, there has been a lull in activity after the recent spate of market highs.
